Funding by tier

Eligible schemes after profile filter
must-apply · accessible74
worth-it · accessible106
conditional · UKRI home-fee-capped36
long-shot86
Only accessible (EU-eligible, funded) borse are must-apply. Conditional = UKRI/EPSRC home-fee-capped, overseas funding not guaranteed. 43 filtered out as ineligible (US-only, Master's-only, refugee-only…).

Candidate PIs matched to your profile. Confidence chips flag web-verification; always confirm current status + whether they take students before emailing. Set an outreach status on each — it saves in your browser.
